validation_summary.method: scripts/orvyq_speech_qa.py against the full 804.362s recording, run in GitHub Actions (this sandbox cannot download Whisper model weights -- huggingface.co is policy-blocked here) -- see .github/workflows/orvyq-narration-validation.yml, run 29928374281
validation_summary.notes: Transcript opens with the script's real opening line ('Every major AI lab on Earth believes moving this fast might be dangerous...') and closes with the script's real final line ('...It's still being decided... by people, right now.'), in the correct order throughout -- confirms this recording does NOT have the rotation defect described in voice/audio_repair.json (that repair, rotate_at_seconds=72.12, describes a different, much shorter ~114s prior recording used for the proof; it does not apply to this file and audio_repair.json is left unmodified as a historical record of that earlier defect). Human listening review is the project owner's own responsibility as the source of this recording; this validation_summary covers the automated checks only.
